full_text:
Emperor Ming [Liu Zhuang] 漢明帝[劉莊]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Ming [Liu Zhuang] (漢明帝[劉莊]). Second emperor of the Eastern Han dynasty. Hard-working and showed integrity. Emperor Ming [Liu Zhuang] was an historic figure affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Emperor Ming [Liu Zhuang] lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
